stemHtml: One advantage of a supercritical wing aerofoil over a conventional one is:

options.a: that there is no need for spoilers.
options.b: improved Dutch roll damping at cruise altitude.
options.c: it allows a wing of increased relative thickness to be used for approximately the same cruise Mach number.
options.d: a lower value of M<sub>CRIT</sub> at the same relative thickness.
